recommendations.title: Leviathan
recommendations.overview: An experimental portrait of the North American commercial fishing industry through the lens of GoPro cameras placed on a fishing vessel off the coast of New England.

recommendations.title: Ingrid Goes West
recommendations.overview: Ingrid becomes obsessed with a social network star named Taylor Sloane who seemingly has a perfect life. But when Ingrid decides to drop everything and move west to be Taylor's friend, her behaviour turns unsettling and dangerous.

recommendations.title: I'm Gonna Git You Sucka
recommendations.overview: Jack Spade returns from the army in his old ghetto neighbourhood when his brother, June Bug, dies. Jack declares war on Mr. Big, powerful local crimelord. His army is led by John Slade, his childhood idol who used to fight bad guys in the 70s.

recommendations.overview: A woman's chaotic life becomes more complicated when she inherits her grandmother's dog.

recommendations.title: Theatre of Blood
recommendations.overview: A Shakespearean actor takes poetic revenge on the critics who denied him recognition.
